text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah! Hm... Reopening of Japan in 1854!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I take it I've stumbled upon you both playing a
word chain game? The words seem somewhat
more out there than I'm used to...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nice ear! In this version of the game, you
have to start with "r" and end with "r."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, and I wouldn't have it any easier. This
feeling of being on the edge of defeat... That's
what really gets the soul burning!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The edge of defeat... I see. Perhaps you could
add even more rules, like not being able to use "r"
in the middle of a word, for example.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa now, quite the ruthless lady we have here!
We can crank the stakes up higher for sure!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! Flash, you're playing now too! It's a
three-way battle to the end!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huh? You want me... to play?
